text: Yaar ye movie bahut amazing thi! Best film of the year, no doubt about it.
Esta clase es so boring, I can't even stay awake. Necesito cafe urgente.
Kya bakwas service hai, totally ruined my experience. Never going back there again.
Just finished my proyecto final and I'm so relieved. Que alivio, por fin!
Aaj ka weather kaafi pleasant hai, perfect for a walk in the park.
No puedo creer que me fired from my job. This is the worst day ever, estoy devastado.
Mujhe nahi pata kya feel karu, the movie was sad but also beautiful at the same time.
Mi hermana got married yesterday and the ceremony fue hermosa. So happy for her!
Office mein aaj kuch special nahi hua, just another regular day with lots of meetings.
Estoy tan enojada con el customer service, they kept me waiting for two hours. Horrible experience pero at least they finally resolved it.
